name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper to get the set of processes *)
ProcSet == 1..N

(* Helper to get the set of processes not in critical *)
NonCritical(p) == {q \in ProcSet : state[q] # Critical}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with lower or equal turn *)
LowerOrEqualTurn(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] <= turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with lower turn *)
LowerTurn(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] < turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with higher turn *)
HigherTurn(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] > turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same turn *)
SameTurn(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same turn and lower id *)
SameTurnLowerId(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p] /\ q < p}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same
   turn and higher id *)
SameTurnHigherId(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p] /\ q > p}

name: Two-Phase Commit
Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define philosophers and forks as the set {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper functions to get left and right forks for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Predicate that checks if a philosopher can start eating *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = i /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = i

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
        /\ forks \in [Forks -> 0]

(* Action for a philosopher to become hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ state[i] = "thinking"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

(* Action for a philosopher to start eating if both forks are available *)
Eat(i) == /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = 0
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i,
                                      ![RightFork(i)] = i]

(* Action for a philosopher to finish eating and put down forks *)
Finish(i) == /\ state[i] = "eating"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0,
                                      ![RightFork(i)] = 0]

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition to the next state *)
Next == \E i \in Philosophers :
          (Hungry(i) \/ Eat(i) \/ Finish(i))

(* Specification of the system *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK == \A i \in Philosophers :
           IF i = N THEN state[i] # "eating" \/ state[1] # "eating" ELSE TRUE

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N \* number of processes, N >= 1, N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 means no ticket
   flag[i] is TRUE while process i is choosing a ticket *)
IsNumbered(i) == num[i] > 0
Choosing(i) == flag[i]

(* Helper: maximum ticket among all processes *)
MaxTicket == Max (num)

(* Helper: next ticket number for process i *)
NextTicket(i) == IF MaxTicket = 0 THEN 1 ELSE MaxTicket + 1

(* Action: process i starts choosing a ticket *)
Choose(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Action: process i finishes choosing a ticket, obtains ticket t *)
FinishChoose(i, t) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = t]
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

(* Action: process i leaves the critical section, releases ticket *)
Leave(i) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Action: process i enters critical section (no other process with
   smaller ticket or same ticket with smaller id) *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ num[i] > 0
  /\ \A j \in 1..N :
       num[j] = 0 \/ (num[j] > num[i]) \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i)

(* Next relation: any process may start choosing, finish choosing,
   enter, or leave. *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (Choosing(i) /\ Choose(i)) \/
    (Choosing(i) /\ \E t \in 1..(MaxTicket+1) : FinishChoose(i, t)) \/
    (IsNumbered(i) /\ Enter(i)) \/
    (IsNumbered(i) /\ Leave(i))

(* Initial state: all processes have no ticket and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Type invariant: num and flag are functions over 1..N with appropriate ranges *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
           /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the buffer contents.
   head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1) indicating the
   next position to read and write, respectively.
   size is the current number of items in the queue. *)

Init == /\ q = <<>> /\ head = 0 /\ tail = 0 /\ size = 0

Producer(x) ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, x)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

Next == Producer[ANY x \in 1..10] \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL

(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* State machine states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
  /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Transition: a follower starts an election *)
StartElection ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
    /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![s] = currentTerm[s] + 1]
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Transition: a server receives a vote request and grants it if it hasn't voted yet in this term *)
GrantVote ==
  \E s, r \in Servers :
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[r]
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = r]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: a candidate becomes leader if it receives a majority of votes *)
BecomeLeader ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A t \in Servers : (t = s) \/ (votedFor[t] = s)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Transition: a leader steps down if it discovers a higher term *)
StepDown ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    /\ state[s] = "Leader"
    /\ \E t \in Servers : currentTerm[t] > currentTerm[s]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ StartElection
  \/ GrantVote
  \/ BecomeLeader
  \/ StepDown

(* Variables *)
VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* Invariant: at most one leader per term *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in [Servers -> Nat]
  /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> (Servers \cup {NULL})]
  /\ state \in [Servers -> State]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N



VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* State space: readers ∈ 0..N, writer_active ∈ {TRUE, FALSE} *)

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader actions *)
ReaderEnter == 
  /\ readers < N
  /\ ~writer_active
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReaderExit == 
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer actions *)
WriterEnter == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ ~writer_active
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriterExit == 
  /\ writer_active
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Next-state relation: any action may occur *)
Next == 
  \/ ReaderEnter
  \/ ReaderExit
  \/ WriterEnter
  \/ WriterExit

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

(* Invariant: no reader when writer active *)
TypeOK == 
  (writer_active => readers = 0)

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) *)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd, finished

(* state[p] is the local state of process p (a natural number) *)
(* channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages in transit on channel p->q *)
(* recvd[p] is the set of markers received by p from each incoming channel *)
(* finished[p] is TRUE iff p has finished recording its state *)

(* Initial state: all processes have state 0, all channels empty, no markers received, not finished *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> {}]
        /\ finished = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a normal message from p to q *)
SendMsg(p, q, m) ==
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, finished>>

(* Sending a marker from p to q *)
SendMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, finished>>

(* Receiving a message on channel (p, q) *)
RecvMsg(p, q) ==
  /\ channel[(p, q)] # <<>>
  /\ LET m == Head(channel[(p, q)]) IN
     /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Tail(channel[(p, q)])
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = @ + 1] (* example state update *)
     /\ UNCHANGED <<recvd, finished>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel (p, q) *)
RecvMarker(p, q) ==
  /\ channel[(p, q)] # <<>>
  /\ LET m == Head(channel[(p, q)]) IN
     /\ channel'[(p, q)] = Tail(channel[(p, q)])
     /\ recvd' = [recvd EXCEPT ![p] = @ \cup {q}]
     /\ IF RecvMarker(p, q) THEN
          /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]

          /\ UNCHANGED finished

(* A process p records its state if it has not yet finished and receives a marker on all incoming channels *)
RecordState(p) ==
  /\ finished[p] = FALSE
  /\ \A q \in Proc : (q, p) \in Chan
  /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd>>

(* A process p sends markers on all outgoing channels after recording its state *)
SendMarkers(p) ==
  /\ finished[p] = TRUE
  /\ \E q \in Proc : (p, q) \in Chan
  /\ \E q \in Proc : (p, q) \in Chan
  /\ \E q \in Proc : (p, q) \in Chan
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd>>

Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    \E q \in Proc :
      \/ SendMsg(p, q, 1)
      \/ SendMarker(p, q)
      \/ RecvMsg(p, q)
      \/ RecvMarker(p, q)
      \/ RecordState(p)
      \/ SendMarkers(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd, finished>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Proc -> Nat]
  /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat)]
  /\ recvd \in [Proc -> SUBSET Proc]
  /\ finished \in [Proc -> BOOLEAN]

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State: a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Initial state: empty store *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Helper to update store with a new key-value pair *)
Put(k, v) == store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Helper to read a value from the store *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ store[k] # NULL

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          Put(k, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers; each proposer has a unique id in 1..M *)
VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

(* ballots[p] = current ballot number of proposer p *)
(* promises[a] = max ballot number promised by acceptor a *)
(* accepts[a] = {b, v} if acceptor a has accepted value v at ballot b, else ∅ *)
(* chosen = {v} if value v has been chosen, else ∅ *)

Init == 
    /\ ballots = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
    /\ promises = [a \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ accepts = [a \in 1..N |-> ∅]
    /\ chosen = {}

Prepare(p, v) == 
    /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promises, accepts, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == 
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = ballots[p]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

Accept(p, v) == 
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = {ballots[p], v}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

Chosen(v) == 
    /\ chosen' = {v}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V :
        Prepare(p, v) \/ Accept(p, v) \/ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
\* Import basic temporal logic
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* CONSTANTS
\*   MAX_RETRIES   -- maximum number of retransmission attempts per chunk
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VARIABLES
\*   sent      -- set of chunks that have been sent (including retransmits)
\*   acked     -- set of chunks that have been acknowledged
\*   retries   -- mapping from chunk -> number of retransmission attempts
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES sent, acked, retries

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper definitions
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* All chunks of the file (assume file size is 1..N)
FileSize == 10
AllChunks == 1..FileSize

\* A chunk is considered successfully transmitted when it is in acked
Success(chunk) == chunk \in acked

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retries = [c \in AllChunks |-> 0]

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Sending a chunk (non-deterministic success or loss)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Send(chunk) ==
    /\ chunk \in AllChunks
    /\ chunk \notin sent
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Acknowledgment arrival (non-deterministic)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Ack(chunk) ==
    /\ chunk \in sent
    /\ chunk \notin acked
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Retransmission attempt (only if not yet acknowledged and retries < MAX_RETRIES)
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Retransmit(chunk) ==
    /\ chunk \in sent
    /\ chunk \notin acked
    /\ retries[chunk] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![chunk] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* One step of the protocol: either send a new chunk, acknowledge a sent
\* chunk, or retransmit a lost chunk (if retries allow).
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Step ==
    \E chunk \in AllChunks :
        \E action \in {Send, Ack, Retransmit} :
            action(chunk)

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Next-state relation
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    Step

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Specification
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: no chunk is acknowledged before being sent
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
NoAckBeforeSend ==
    \A c \in AllChunks : (c \in acked) => (c \in sent)

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: total number of retransmissions per chunk never exceeds
\* MAX_RETRIES
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
MaxRetriesBound ==
    \A c \in AllChunks : retries[c] <= MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: all chunks are eventually acknowledged
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
AllChunksAcknowledged ==
    \A c \in AllChunks : <> (c \in acked)

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Safety properties
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK ==
    /\ sent \subseteq AllChunks
    /\ acked \subseteq AllChunks
    /\ \A c \in AllChunks : typeof(retries[c]) = "Nat"

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS T, K, V, NULL
VARIABLES commitTs, db, readSet, startTs, state, t, writeSet, writeVals

    /\ db \in [K -> V]
    /\ state = [t \in T |-> "idle"]
    /\ startTs = [t \in T |-> 0]
    /\ commitTs = [t \in T |-> 0]
    /\ readSet = [t \in T |-> {}]
    /\ writeSet = [t \in T |-> {}]
    /\ writeVals = [t \in T |-> [k \in K |-> NULL]]

Next ==
    \E t \in T :
        \/ Begin(t)
        \/ Commit(t)
        \/ Abort(t)

    /\ state[t] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ startTs' = [startTs EXCEPT ![t] = Time]
    /\ commitTs' = commitTs
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ writeSet' = writeSet
    /\ writeVals' = writeVals

Commit(t) ==
    /\ state[t] = "active"
    /\ \A k \in writeSet[t] :
        \A t' \in T \ {t} :
            /\ state[t'] = "committed"
            /\ commitTs[t'] > startTs[t]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ commitTs' = [commitTs EXCEPT ![t] = Time]
    /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = writeVals[t][k] : k \in writeSet[t]]
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ writeSet' = writeSet
    /\ writeVals' = writeVals

Abort(t) ==
    /\ state[t] = "active"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ startTs' = startTs
    /\ commitTs' = commitTs
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ writeSet' = writeSet
    /\ writeVals' = writeVals

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a function from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN *)
(* turn is either P1 or P2 *)

Init == /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = P1

(* Process i enters critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  LET j == IF i = P1 THEN P2 ELSE P1 IN
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ turn = j

(* Process i exits critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  flag[i] = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ Enter(P1)
  \/ Enter(P2)
  \/ Exit(P1)
  \/ Exit(P2)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node is identified by an integer in 1..N *)
ASSUME \A n \in 1..N : n \in Nodes

VARIABLES known, infected

(* known[n] is the set of nodes that node n knows about *)
(* infected is the set of nodes that have received the gossip *)

Init == /\ known = [n \in Nodes |-> {}]
        /\ infected = {}

Next == \E n \in Nodes :
          /\ \E m \in Nodes : m # n
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![n] = known[n] \cup {m}]
          /\ infected' = infected \cup {n}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
Pages == 1..N
Clients == {"C1", "C2", "C3"}  \* Example client set

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

\* Allocate a page p to client c if p is free
Alloc(c, p) == /\ p \in free
                /\ free' = free \ {p}
                /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]

\* Release a page p from client c
Release(c, p) == /\ p \in allocated[c]
                 /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
          Alloc(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

\* Invariant: no page allocated to more than one client
TypeOK == \A p \in Pages: Cardinality({c \in Clients: p \in allocated[c]}) <= 1

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Sequence
VARIABLES inboxes, subs


(* Message type: [topic: TOPIC, payload: ANY] *)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Helper predicates *)

IsMessage(m) == 
    /\ m \in [topic: Topics, payload: UNCHANGED]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)

Init ==
    /\ subs = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Subscription actions *)

Subscribe(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subs' = [subs EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \cup {sub}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

Unsubscribe(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subs' = [subs EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \ {sub}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Publishing action *)

Publish(msg) ==
    /\ IsMessage(msg)
    /\ LET subsFor == subs[msg.topic]
       IN /\ inboxes' = [s \in Subscribers |

                             Append(inboxes[s], msg)

                             inboxes[s]]
        /\ subs' = subs

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)

Next ==
    \/ \E sub, topic : Subscribe(sub, topic)
    \/ \E sub, topic : Unsubscribe(sub, topic)
    \/ \E msg : Publish(msg)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
    \land WF_vars(Next)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Invariants *)

TypeOK ==
    /\ subs \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ inboxes \in [Subscribers -> Seq([topic: Topics)]

AllMessagesDelivered ==
    \A sub \in Subscribers :
        \A msg \in Sequence([topic: Topics, payload: UNCHANGED]) :
            \A t \in Topics :
                (msg \in inboxes[sub] => msg.topic = t)

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* turn = 0 or 1 indicating whose turn it is; wants[0], wants[1] are booleans *)
Init == turn = 0 /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

(* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ wants' = IF i = 0 THEN <<TRUE, wants[2]>> ELSE <<wants[1], TRUE>>
  /\ turn' = i

(* Process i exits critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ wants' = IF i = 0 THEN <<FALSE, wants[2]>> ELSE <<wants[1], FALSE>>
  /\ UNCHANGED turn

Next ==

    (turn = i /\ ~wants[1-i] /\ Enter(i)) \/ 
    (turn = i /\ wants[i] /\ ~wants[1-i] /\ Exit(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

(* Safety: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == 
  turn \in {0,1} /\ 
  \A i \in {0,1} : wants[i] \in BOOLEAN

---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node has a vector of counters, one per node *)
VARIABLES counts

(* Helper: vector addition *)
vecAdd(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> v1[i] + v2[i]]

(* Helper: element-wise max of two vectors *)
vecMax(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> IF v1[i] > v2[i] THEN v1[i] ELSE v2[i]]

(* Helper: maximum over a set of vectors *)
maxSet(S) == IF S = {} THEN [i \in 1..N |-> 0]


(* Initial state: all counters zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Nodes |-> [i \in 1..N |-> 0]]

(* Increment at node n: increase its own slot by 1 *)
Inc(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = vecAdd(counts[n], [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = n THEN 1 ELSE 0])]

(* Merge state of node n with state of node m: element-wise max *)
Merge(n, m) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = vecMax(counts[n], counts[m])]

(* Next-state relation: any node may increment or merge with any other node *)
Next == \E n \in Nodes : Inc(n) \/ \E m \in Nodes : n # m /\ Merge(n, m)

(* Total count is the sum of the maximum values across all slots *)
Total == SUM i \in 1..N : (maxSet({counts[n][i] : n \in Nodes}))

(* Invariant: all counters are nonnegative integers *)
TypeOK == \A n \in Nodes : \A i \in 1..N : counts[n][i] \in Nat

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
